compare-pdf-page-range.title: Compare Specific Page Range of Two PDFs
compare-pdf-page-range.description: Loads two PDF files, validates a user‑defined page range, and uses Aspose.Pdf's comparison engine to detect text differences on each page within that range.

compare-selected-pdf-pages.title: Compare Selected PDF Pages
compare-selected-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates extracting specific pages from two PDFs and comparing them with Aspose.Pdf's TextPdfComparer, producing a visual diff PDF and a list of changes per page.

compare-pdfs-page-by-page-diff.title: Compare PDFs Page by Page and Generate Diff PDF
compare-pdfs-page-by-page-diff.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDF documents page by page using Aspose.Pdf's default ComparisonOptions and save the visual differences to a diff PDF file.

compare-pdfs-with-excluded-areas.title: Compare PDFs with Excluded Areas
compare-pdfs-with-excluded-areas.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDF documents while excluding specific rectangular regions from each document using Aspose.Pdf's ComparisonOptions.

compare-pdfs-including-form-field-values.title: Compare PDFs Including Form Field Values
compare-pdfs-including-form-field-values.description: Loads two PDF files, compares them page‑by‑page using Aspose.Pdf.Comparison, and saves a visual diff PDF. Form field values are included automatically in the comparison.

case-insensitive-pdf-text-comparison.title: Case‑Insensitive PDF Text Comparison
case-insensitive-pdf-text-comparison.description: Demonstrates how to perform a case‑insensitive comparison of two PDF files by normalizing all text fragments to lower case before using Aspose.Pdf's TextPdfComparer.

compare-pdfs-excluding-digital-signature.title: Compare PDFs Excluding Digital Signature Fields
compare-pdfs-excluding-digital-signature.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDF documents while treating digital signature fields as unchanged regions by collecting their rectangles and passing them as exclude areas to the comparison engine.

compare-pdfs-unicode-text.title: Compare PDFs with Unicode Text Differences
compare-pdfs-unicode-text.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDF documents that use different language encodings, detect Unicode text differences, and generate a visual diff PDF.

compare-encrypted-pdfs-side-by-side.title: Compare Encrypted PDFs Using Side‑by‑Side Comparison
compare-encrypted-pdfs-side-by-side.description: The example opens two password‑protected PDF files by providing their passwords to the Document constructors, then performs a side‑by‑side comparison of the first pages and saves the result PDF.

generate-diff-pdf-with-highlighted-chang.title: Generate Diff PDF with Highlighted Changes
generate-diff-pdf-with-highlighted-chang.description: Shows how to compare two PDFs using Aspose.Pdf's GraphicalPdfComparer to create a diff PDF with highlighted text changes and verify the default highlight color.

set-custom-image-similarity-tolerance.title: Set Custom Image Similarity Tolerance for PDF Comparison
set-custom-image-similarity-tolerance.description: Demonstrates how to compare two scanned‑image PDFs using Aspose.Pdf's GraphicalPdfComparer while applying a custom tolerance percentage to ignore minor image differences.

get-image-differences-between-pdf-pages.title: Get Image Differences Between PDF Pages
get-image-differences-between-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to compare corresponding pages of two PDF documents and retrieve the pixel‑level image differences using Aspose.Pdf's graphical comparer.

compare-two-pdfs-visual-difference.title: Compare Two PDFs and Generate Visual Difference Report
compare-two-pdfs-visual-difference.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's comparison API to detect differences between two PDF files and save a visual diff report as a new PDF.

compare-pdfs-diff-memory.title: Compare PDFs and Generate Diff PDF in Memory
compare-pdfs-diff-memory.description: Loads two PDF documents from streams, uses Aspose's graphical comparer to create a visual diff for each page, and writes the resulting diff PDF to a memory stream without creating temporary files.

exclude-annotations-from-pdf-comparison.title: Exclude Annotations from PDF Comparison
exclude-annotations-from-pdf-comparison.description: Shows how to gather annotation bounding rectangles from two PDFs and configure side‑by‑side comparison to ignore those areas using Aspose.Pdf.

parallel-pdf-comparison.title: Parallel PDF Comparison with Aspose.Pdf
parallel-pdf-comparison.description: Demonstrates how to compare multiple pairs of PDF files concurrently using Aspose.Pdf's side‑by‑side comparer and .NET parallel processing.

side-by-side-pdf-comparison.title: Side‑by‑Side PDF Comparison with Page Size Alignment
side-by-side-pdf-comparison.description: Demonstrates comparing two PDFs that have different page sizes using Aspose.Pdf's side‑by‑side comparer and verifies the resulting document contains the expected number of pages.

compare-pdfs-detect-font-changes.title: Compare PDFs and Detect Font Changes
compare-pdfs-detect-font-changes.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's TextPdfComparer to compare two PDF documents page‑by‑page and report font‑related differences as separate diff operations.

compare-pdfs-excluding-footer-areas.title: Compare PDFs While Excluding Footer Areas
compare-pdfs-excluding-footer-areas.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDF documents side‑by‑side while excluding footer regions by defining rectangular exclusion areas for each document.

create-pdf-diff-using-comparedocuments-t.title: Create Diff PDF Using CompareDocumentsToPdf
create-pdf-diff-using-comparedocuments-t.description: The example loads two PDF files, compares them with Aspose.Pdf.Comparison's GraphicalPdfComparer, and saves a diff PDF that highlights the changes to a specified output folder.

generate-json-diff-report-pdf-comparison.title: Generate JSON Diff Report for PDF Comparison
generate-json-diff-report-pdf-comparison.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDF files using Aspose.Pdf's TextPdfComparer, iterate over DiffOperation objects, and generate a JSON diff report.

compare-pdfs-text-diff-ignore-compressio.title: Compare PDFs Textually While Ignoring Compression
compare-pdfs-text-diff-ignore-compressio.description: Loads two PDFs with identical content but different compression settings and performs a flat text comparison using Aspose.Pdf.Comparison, outputting textual differences and saving a visual diff PDF.

copy-pdf-metadata-to-diff-document.title: Copy PDF Metadata to Diff Document After Comparison
copy-pdf-metadata-to-diff-document.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDFs with Aspose.Pdf, generate a diff PDF, and preserve the original document's metadata by copying it to the diff file.

generate-visual-diff-pdf.title: Generate Visual Diff PDF Using GraphicalPdfComparer
generate-visual-diff-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDF files graphically and create a visual diff PDF with Aspose.Pdf's GraphicalPdfComparer.

parallel-batch-pdf-comparison.title: Parallel Batch PDF Comparison with Concurrency Limit
parallel-batch-pdf-comparison.description: Demonstrates comparing multiple PDFs against a reference document in parallel while restricting the maximum degree of parallelism to control memory consumption.

compare-pdfs-log-differences.title: Compare PDFs and Log Differences by Page
compare-pdfs-log-differences.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDF documents page‑by‑page using Aspose.Pdf, extract the diff operations, and write an audit log containing the operation type and page number.

replace-inserted-text-using-diffoperatio.title: Replace Inserted Text in PDF Using DiffOperation
replace-inserted-text-using-diffoperatio.description: The example loads two PDFs, compares each page with TextPdfComparer to find insert operations, and replaces the inserted text in the second PDF with the original text from the first PDF before saving the result.

generate-pdf-diff-images-zip.title: Generate PDF Diff Images and Zip Them
generate-pdf-diff-images-zip.description: Shows how to compare two PDF files with Aspose.Pdf, create visual diff images for each page, and package the images into a ZIP archive for easy distribution.
